name: Absorption City
description:
Welcome to Absorption — the city where anyone can change.

The year 2030. After a new weapon was tested, a meteor was destroyed, and a wave of mysterious energy washed over Earth. Now every person possesses the Absorption Power: during intimacy, you can take part of your partner's body — height, breasts, ass, muscles, or manhood/cock.

Absorption City is a massive metropolis whose population is split into two halves: those who have already changed, and those who remain ordinary. Here you can encounter:

— Giant futa girls towering over the crowd.
— Amazons with perfect musculature.
— Femboys with voluptuous curves.
— Short guys with hyper-endowed cocks.
— Ordinary people who haven't yet experimented.

But be careful: Dark Thieves prowl the dark alleys — those who take what they want by force. The police and special sanatoriums for victims try to maintain order, but danger lurks around every corner.
This is a life simulator. Explore the city, socialize, start relationships, and remember: every decision can permanently change your body... and maybe finally get laid.


___________________________________________________________


Type of publication, 03.15.26:
After a while, thanks to one creature, the English version of "City of Absorption" appeared. Compared to the original, this version uses fewer tokens, due to the language barrier.
creator: Sanlen
